Book a Class with Me

For more information about my curriculum, projects, and students population, check my CV or LinkedIn

01. Private Class

A private class with flexible schedule where the courses are tailored based on your needs.

02. General English (Businness, Vocational, Adult Learning Beginner)

Small group class where the courses are tailored based on your needs.

03. IELTS Package

Get yourself ready for IELTS test. Discuss strategies, practice questions and answers, try out.

04. Proofread, Translation, Consultation

Get help to proofread your journal abstract, personal statement or motivation letter.

Ping me!
